summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed in NotificationBell.tsx by repositioning the panel using fixed coordinates calculated from the bell button's bounding rect. REQ-2 is addressed across KanbanBoard.tsx, TaskCard.tsx, StatusBadgeDropdown.tsx, and PriorityBadge.tsx with improved color contrast for column headers, task cards, status badges, and priority badges.
